_note: Editable scan parameters. The engine (config.py) and the dashboard both read this. Edit the thresholds, the PCA cut, or the underwriter watchlist here and re-run; no code change needed. Reconcile the watchlist and the symbol->firm map (underwriters.json) against FINRA/SEC actions and your own syndicate records.

underwriter_sources.US Tiger Securities: FINRA AWC — US Tiger/TradeUP consented to sanctions in small-cap ramp-and-dump context
underwriter_sources.Spartan Capital Securities: FINRA Dept. of Enforcement fraud/churning complaint
underwriter_sources.Aegis Capital: SEC/FINRA fines for SAR failures and penny-stock supervision
underwriter_sources.Boustead Securities: FINRA complaint — ~30 small/micro/nano-cap offerings, many China
underwriter_sources.Network 1 Financial Securities: FINRA AWC — CIP failures on foreign small-cap IPO investors
underwriter_sources.Sutter Securities: named alongside Boustead in FINRA supervision/AML complaint
